bullets.text: Automated network certificate processes to meet corporate security mandates and protect internal traffic across the WDAS environment with minimal production impact.
Debugged automation scripts, validated SSL configurations, and implemented proactive monitoring to cut certificate-related incidents by 90% and reduce troubleshooting time from hours to minutes.
Created documentation and roadmaps to guide future certificate integration and infrastructure scaling.

company.name: CSULB University Housing and Residential Life

bullets.text: Provide first-line technical support for network access, cable systems, and policy enforcement for 3,000+ residents.
Assess and troubleshoot computer problems brought by students, faculty and staff.
Assist with door access maintenance through Netbox (IRM) and manage front desk technology-related support.
Provided technical support (via phone and deskside) and solutions for hardware and software issues experienced by artists and engineers during the production of Moana 2.
Scope of support included troubleshooting hardware, networking, and software issues in a Linux and MacOS environment.
Resolved over 125 Jira tickets to ensure minimal downtime and efficient resolution of technical issues.
